title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 527.160 - Practice to conform to code of civil procedure
text:
527.160.  Practice to conform to code of civil procedure. — The institution, prosecution, trial and determination of suits under section 527.150 shall conform in all respects to the provisions of the code of civil procedure now existing and be in force in this state concerning actions affecting real estate, and judgments rendered in such suits shall have the force and effect as therein provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 1685) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1521; 1919 § 1971; 1909 § 2536
